历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 22512 → 22959 → 22018 → 46486 → 31830. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform and batch merger, the ranking significantly dropped (46486), but in 2025 it rebounded to 31830. Over the past two years, the cumulative drop is about 9800 positions (compared to 2023), but in 2025 it moved forward by about 14656 positions compared to 2024, indicating that rankings are stabilizing after the reform. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 31830. The provincial enrollment plan for science (physics category) is: 20 in 2021, 24 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 34 in 2024, 39 in 2025, and 39 in 2026. The plan remains unchanged from 2025 to 2026, with no expansion or reduction, thus no direct impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science University Ranking has steadily risen from 170th in 2021 to 137th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving a library seat-occupying item management incident, with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 104th, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure. No abnormal signals related to Ningxia University are found in historical admission anomaly records, with no gaps or sharp drops. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ningxia University has no A- or above disciplines; its advantageous disciplines are mainly at B+ and below levels, such as Grass Science, Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Ethnology. Its disciplinary competitiveness is in the middle to lower segment among 211 universities, with limited appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's physics category enrollment majors (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, etc.). In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is 377,900, an increase of about 32.2% compared to 2025 (285,688). Among them, physics category candidates are estimated at about 229,000 (an increase of about 32.2% from 173,282 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition. Ningxia University is located in the Ningxia Hui Autonomous Region (Northwest China), with a small enrollment scale in Yunnan Province (39 physics category candidates in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 31830, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 32.2% in provincial physics category candidates leading to intensified competition, and the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing attractiveness, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 32030, with a range of 31530 to 32530.

- Mechanical Engineering (Main Campus).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (31530–32530), it is recommended to target Tier 2 Civil Engineering as the main direction, with Tier 1 Mathematics and Applied Mathematics and Mechanical Engineering as reach goals, and Tier 3 Applied Psychology, Finance, Biological Sciences, and Chemical Engineering and Technology as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors.
